extDesc.message: Shows whether the current page goes direct or through a proxy, with rule, latency, traffic and node switching (via Clash external controller)

errHint.message: Cannot reach the Clash controller: $ERR$. Check the address and secret in settings, and the external-controller option in your Clash config.

noRecord.message: No connection record for $HOST$. Reload the page, then reopen this popup.

setupHint.message: First run: enter your Clash external controller address and secret below, click "Test connection", then save. You can find the address in Clash Verge / Clash for Windows settings.

bgNotConfigured.message: Clash Indicator: not configured yet — click the icon to set up

wIntro.message: Two quick steps, then the icon color tells you in real time whether the current page goes direct or through a proxy.

wStep1Desc.message: Click the puzzle icon 🧩 in the toolbar, find "Clash Indicator", and click the pin next to it. Without pinning, you would have to dig through the menu every time.

wStep2Desc.message: Enter your Clash external controller address and secret (found in Clash Verge / Clash for Windows settings), click "Test connection", then save.

wStep3Desc.message: Open any page and watch the toolbar icon color:

bgNoRecord.message: $HOST$: no connection record, reload the page and retry
